pr.title: ClownCar: Frugendorff compression baseline + canonical DeltaNet integration

output.summary: ClownCar reuses a shared Frugendorff crawler with DeltaNet kernels and int8-aware tweaks to trade depth for width in a compression-focused tiny model.
techniques: Weight-shared Frugendorff crawler looping with loop-conditioned flow instructions
Canonical DeltaNet kernels replacing Python chunks
Int8-aware crawler quant mode for shared-weight resilience
